title: Adhi Ratneswarar Temple
tagline: Adhi Ratneswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Adhi Ratneswarar Temple is a major Hindu temple with Shiva as the presiding deity, located in the town of Tiruvadanai in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: The Adhi Ratneswarar Temple is a major Hindu temple with Shiva as the presiding deity, located in the town of Tiruvadanai in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvadanai
topPlaces.description: Tiruvadanai or Thiruvadanai is a town and a taluk headquarters of the Ramanathapuram district, in Tamil Nadu, India. The town is known for the Adhi Ratneswarar Temple and is mentioned in the Thevaram hymns.

topPlaces.name: Anjukottai
topPlaces.description: Anjukottai is a village in northern Ramnad district, Tamil Nadu, India, 4 kilometres (2.5 mi) from Tiruvadanai; and 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) from Thondi. It includes seven small villages: Vaniyenthal, Melavayal, Pottakottai, Manathadal, Karaiyakottai, Chinna Anjukottai and Periya Anjukottai.

topPlaces.name: Karkathakudi
topPlaces.description: Karkathakudi is a small town and panchayat located in the Ramanathapuram district of Tamil Nadu state, India. The villages under the panchayat of Karkathakudi are Siruvandal, Peruvandal, Melapanaiyur, Keelapanaiyur, Gudalur, and Karungudi.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvetriyur (Ramanathapuram)
topPlaces.description: Thiruvetriyur is a Village in Tiruvadanai taluk, Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu in southern India. The place is famous for ancient Bagampriyal Kovil.

topPlaces.name: Thondi
topPlaces.description: Thondi (தொண்டி) is a town located in the Ramanathapuram district of the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is about 25 km from Tiruvadanai.

items.note: Tiruvadanai or Thiruvadanai is a town and a taluk headquarters of the Ramanathapuram district, in Tamil Nadu, India. The town is known for the Adhi Ratneswarar Temple and is mentioned in the Thevaram hymns.

Anjukottai is a village in northern Ramnad district, Tamil Nadu, India, 4 kilometres (2.5 mi) from Tiruvadanai; and 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) from Thondi. It includes seven small villages: Vaniyenthal, Melavayal, Pottakottai, Manathadal, Karaiyakottai, Chinna Anjukottai and Periya Anjukottai.

Karkathakudi is a small town and panchayat located in the Ramanathapuram district of Tamil Nadu state, India. The villages under the panchayat of Karkathakudi are Siruvandal, Peruvandal, Melapanaiyur, Keelapanaiyur, Gudalur, and Karungudi.
Thiruvetriyur is a Village in Tiruvadanai taluk, Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu in southern India. The place is famous for ancient Bagampriyal Kovil.
Thondi (தொண்டி) is a town located in the Ramanathapuram district of the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is about 25 km from Tiruvadanai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Adhi Ratneswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Adhi Ratneswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Adhi Ratneswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (91 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Adhi Ratneswarar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Adhi Ratneswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Adhi Ratneswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Adhi Ratneswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Adhi Ratneswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tiruvadanai, Anjukottai, Karkathakudi, Thiruvetriyur (Ramanathapuram), Thondi.
